title: HTML Images
content: ### HTML Images Images are defined with the `` tag (void element). --- ### Basic Image ```html ``` --- ### Required Attributes | Attribute | Purpose | |-----------|---------| | `src` | Path to the image file | | `alt` | Alternative text (for accessibility) | --- ### Image Size ```html ``` Use `width` and `height` or CSS. Setting `height: auto` maintains aspect ratio. --- ### Image Formats | Format | Best For | |--------|----------| | **JPEG (.jpg)** | Photos, complex images | | **PNG (.png)** | Graphics, transparency | | **GIF (.gif)** | Animations | | **SVG (.svg)** | Icons, logos (scales infinitely) | | **WebP (.webp)** | Modern, smaller file size | --- ### Image from Another Folder ```html ``` --- ### Image from Another Website ```html ``` --- ### Animated Images ```html ``` --- > **Pro Tip:** Always include the `alt` attribute. It helps screen readers and displays when the image fails to load. Search engines also use it.

quiz.question: Which attribute provides alternative text for an image?
